title: hedyotis coccinea
intro: Hedyotis coccinea, also known as red honeysuckle or Chinese honeysuckle, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and promoting wound healing. Hedyotis coccinea is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses.
